title: xanthophyllum lineare
intro: Xanthophyllum lineare, also known as the straight yellow wood, is a species of plant in the family Polygalaceae, native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum lineare include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, which are used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
